(ii) Q gets a North facing flat and is not next to S.
(iii) S and U get diagonally opposite flats.
(iv) R, next to U, gets a south facing flat and T gets a North facing flat.
Which of the following is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)

Statement 2: No teacher is an artist.
Statement 3: All artists are doctors.
Conclusion I: Some teachers are doctors.
Conclusion II: All doctors are artists.
Conclusion III: No artists is a teacher.
Conclusion IV: Some artists are teachers.
Which one of the following options can be logically inferred?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

 
Q6 Not checked

Not attempted

Choose the most appropriate word from the options given below to complete the following sentence:
His overly cheerful comments during the crisis______
his true anxiety about the situation.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Intensified → Made stronger
Revealed → Opposite meaning
Suppressed → Forced down

Q7 Not checked
General Aptitude • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

How may numbers can be made with digits 0, 7, 8 which are greater than ‘0’ and less than a million?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Number of ways to form one digit number = 2
‘0’ cannot be treated as one digit number
Number of ways to form two digit number = 2 × 3 = 6
Number of ways to form three digit number = 2 × 3 × 3 = 18
Number of ways to form four digit number = 2 × 33 = 54
Number of ways to form five digit number = 2 × 34 = 162
Number of ways to foron six digit number = 2 × 35 = 486
Total number of ways = 2 + 6 + 18 + 54 + 162 + 486 = 728

Q9 Not checked
General Aptitude • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Given below are four pairs of words. Identify the one which is different from others.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Murky as well as Dusky – both refer to something which is dark or cheerless – similar in meaning;
Inter means ‘to place’ and exhume means to dig out - opposite in meaning.
Effete means lacking in vigour whereas fructuous means productive or fertile – opposite in meaning.
Benediction is an utterance of good wishes while execration refers to denouncement i.e. both are
opposite in meaning.

Many adults, no matter what their age, respond to adversity by seeking advice only their parents.
Consciously or net, they regness to a psychological state of childhood dependence in which the parent seen as the only source of wisdom and comfort. Adults who don’t regress to childhood mode turn for advice in adversity only to other loved ones- spouse or a best friend - whom they perceive and relate to as peers.
If all the above statements are true, which of the following must also be true ?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
